name: Replicate
tagline: Run AI models in the cloud
description: Run thousands of open-source AI models — image generation, speech, video, and more — via a simple REST API.

auth.hint: Create an API token at replicate.com/account/api-tokens.

tools.name: run_model
tools.description: Run an AI model on Replicate and get a prediction. Provide the model version and inputs.

params.name: version
params.description: Model version ID from the Replicate model page

params.name: input
params.description: Input parameters for the model, e.g. {"prompt":"a cat on the moon","width":512,"height":512}

tools.name: get_prediction
tools.description: Get the status and output of a prediction (model run).

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: Browse popular public models on Replicate.
